# Policy Boundary Matrix

| Conduct | FTC | ACCC | YouTube | TikTok | X | Meta | LinkedIn | GitHub | Google Maps | Google Play | Product Hunt |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Fake reviews | Yes | Yes | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect | No | Yes | Yes | Indirect |
| Hidden sponsorship | Yes | Yes | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect | Advertising rules | Indirect | Indirect | Indirect |
| Fake engagement | Fake indicators | Yes if misleading | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Engagement pods | Indirect | Indirect | Yes if artificial | Yes | Yes | Indirect | Yes | Yes if rank abuse | No | No | Yes if launch gaming |
| Bulk/fake accounts | Indirect | Indirect | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes if reviews | Yes if installs/reviews | Yes if bots |
| Unoriginal/repost content | No | No | Policy dependent | Yes/limited | Spam rules | Yes | No | No | No | No | No |
| Dark patterns | FTC can enforce | ACL principles | No | No | No | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| App ranking manipulation | No | Possible if misleading | No | No | No | No | No | No | No | Yes | No |
| Launch upvote gaming | No | Possible if misleading | No | No | No | No | No | No | No | No | Yes |
